cards.title: Turritopsis dohrnii
cards.body: Turritopsis dohrnii, also known as the 'immortal jellyfish,' is a species of jellyfish that can transform its body into a younger state through a process called transdifferentiation.

cards.title: Mary Toft
cards.body: Mary Toft was an English woman who in 1726 convinced doctors that she had given birth to rabbits, a hoax that became a famous medical case.

cards.title: Fountain of Youth
cards.body: The concept of the Fountain of Youth has been around for thousands of years, with ancient civilizations such as the Greeks and Chinese searching for a magical spring that would grant eternal youth.

cards.title: The Voynich Manuscript
cards.body: The Voynich Manuscript is a mysterious, undeciphered book that has been carbon-dated to the 15th century, with its origins and meaning still unknown.

cards.title: Slime Molds
cards.body: Slime molds are single-celled organisms that can solve mazes and make decisions, despite lacking a brain or nervous system.

cards.title: The Sentinelese
cards.body: The Sentinelese are an indigenous people who inhabit North Sentinel Island, and are known for their isolation and hostility towards outsiders.

cards.title: The Bloop
cards.body: The Bloop is a low-frequency sound detected by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) in 1997, which remains one of the loudest sounds ever recorded.

cards.title: The Great Attractor
cards.body: The Great Attractor is a region of space that is pulling our galaxy, the Milky Way, and many others towards it, with a mass equivalent to thousands of galaxies.

cards.title: Fast Radio Bursts
cards.body: Fast Radio Bursts (FRBs) are brief, intense pulses of radio energy that originate from distant galaxies, with some theories suggesting they could be evidence of advanced alien technology.

cards.title: The Wow! Signal
cards.body: The Wow! Signal is a strong, narrowband radio signal that was detected in 1977, and remains one of the most intriguing examples of an unexplained phenomenon in the search for extraterrestrial intelligence (SETI).

quizzes.question: What is Turritopsis dohrnii known for?
options: Being the largest jellyfish
Having a deadly sting
Being immortal
Having a unique shape
quizzes.explanation: Turritopsis dohrnii is known for its ability to transform its body into a younger state through a process called transdifferentiation, making it theoretically immortal.

quizzes.question: What is the concept of the Fountain of Youth about?
options: A magical spring that grants eternal youth
A mythological creature that grants wishes
A historical event that changed the world
A scientific theory that explains aging
quizzes.explanation: The concept of the Fountain of Youth has been around for thousands of years, with ancient civilizations searching for a magical spring that would grant eternal youth.

quizzes.question: What is unique about slime molds?
options: They are single-celled organisms
They have a complex nervous system
They can solve mazes and make decisions
They are found only in certain environments
quizzes.explanation: Slime molds are single-celled organisms that can solve mazes and make decisions, despite lacking a brain or nervous system.

quizzes.question: What is the Bloop?
options: A low-frequency sound detected by NOAA
A type of marine animal
A natural phenomenon that occurs in the ocean
A man-made structure that emits sound
quizzes.explanation: The Bloop is a low-frequency sound detected by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) in 1997, which remains one of the loudest sounds ever recorded.

quizzes.question: What are Fast Radio Bursts?
options: Brief, intense pulses of radio energy
Long-duration signals that originate from galaxies
Natural phenomena that occur in the atmosphere
Man-made signals used for communication
quizzes.explanation: Fast Radio Bursts (FRBs) are brief, intense pulses of radio energy that originate from distant galaxies, with some theories suggesting they could be evidence of advanced alien technology.

guesses.explanation: The Great Attractor is a region of space that is pulling our galaxy, the Milky Way, and many others towards it, with a mass equivalent to thousands of galaxies.

guesses.explanation: The Sentinelese are an indigenous people who inhabit North Sentinel Island, and are known for their isolation and hostility towards outsiders.
